cdr_id.description: 3CX CdrId — per-leg unique identifier. Primary key for incremental syncs. Multi-leg calls (transfers, conferences, IVR→queue→agent routing) emit multiple rows, one per leg, each with a distinct cdr_id.

main_call_history_id.description: 3CX MainCallHistoryId — the root parent identifier shared by every CDR that belongs to the same logical call. Use this for 'count of unique calls' aggregations (e.g. COUNT(DISTINCT main_call_history_id) FILTER (...)).

call_history_id.description: 3CX CallHistoryId — intermediate grouping identifier. For simple single-leg calls it equals main_call_history_id; for transfer trees it identifies the sub-tree this leg belongs to.

caller_number.description: External or internal phone number of the caller.

queue_name.description: Always NULL on this stream — queue assignments are tracked separately in queue_performance_overview.

agent_extension.description: 3CX extension number of the agent on this call (destination DN for Inbound, source DN for Outbound).

start_time.description: Cursor field for incremental syncs. ISO 8601 with Z suffix (UTC).

end_time.description: Always NULL — 3CX's GetCallLogData OData function does not return a call-end timestamp. Compute downstream from start_time + duration_seconds if needed.

duration_seconds.description: Total call duration in seconds: ringing + talking time.

talk_time_seconds.description: Talking duration only, in seconds. Excludes ringing.

ringing_time_seconds.description: Ringing duration only, in seconds. The portion of the call before the line was answered. Useful as the `wait_time_seconds` source downstream.

is_answered.description: Whether the call was answered. Maps to 3CX 'Answered'.

raw_talking_duration.description: Original 3CX ISO 8601 duration string (e.g. 'PT3M12.139836S'). Preserved for audit; the integer talk_time_seconds is derived from this.

raw_ringing_duration.description: Original 3CX ISO 8601 duration string for ringing time. Preserved for audit; the integer ringing_time_seconds is derived from this.
